title: Born in Vollmer, ID; name change in Troy; disliked for his lending practices
description: Born in Vollmer, Idaho. Name change to Troy. Vollmer disliked for his lending practices. "Biggest little town on earth."

title: Father homesteaded in 1884; came to America from Sweden
description: Father homesteaded in 1884; came to America at age 19 from Sweden. Talked Swedish in the home.

title: 1893 Depression; Coxey's Army got some boys from Troy to join
description: 1893 Depression: hard to get money for postage. Coxey's Army got some Troy boys to join. "The last 250 in the state of Idaho." Hoboes.

title: Early Troy a thriving town; railroad traffic; shooting of Marshall Hayes by Paine sly; prospecting and mining
description: Early Troy a thriving little town. Railroad traffic, livery barns. Shooting of Marshall Hayes by Paine Sly, Prospecting and mining. The Copper Chief.

title: Paul Smith in 1894 decides to leave, but convinced to stay by Dernam and Kaufman
description: Paul Smith in 1894 decides to leave, but is convinced to stay by Dernam and Kaufman. They talk quite a few people into staying, and help them do it.
